definition: Ability to adjust behavior operations investments rules and relationships as conditions change
measurement_note: Use flexibility indicators institutional learning monitoring action cycles and pathway options

definition: Ability to absorb disturbance through redundancy slack diversity reserves and ecological buffers
measurement_note: Use backup capacity spare resources modularity reserve margins diversity and recovery buffers

definition: Ability to redesign structures when current systems become unsafe unjust or unsustainable
measurement_note: Use transition pathways policy reform finance governance innovation and anti lock in indicators

definition: Ability of institutions to coordinate learn revise rules include affected people and remain legitimate
measurement_note: Use participation accountability corrective action transparency coordination and legal flexibility indicators

definition: Ability to reduce unequal exposure recovery burden and decision exclusion
measurement_note: Use disaggregated exposure recovery participation affordability access displacement and rights indicators

definition: Ability of data software sensors cyber physical systems and digital public infrastructure to fail safely
measurement_note: Use cyber posture fallback readiness model validation data governance and continuity indicators

definition: Ability to prepare for heat flood drought wildfire storms sea level rise and compound climate stress
measurement_note: Use climate exposure scenarios adaptation investment ecological buffers and critical service indicators

definition: Remaining exposure to compound cascading networked or planetary risk
measurement_note: Higher values are penalized because exposure reduction remains incomplete

definition: Administrative technical political financial institutional and participation burden
measurement_note: Higher values are penalized because implementation may exceed current capacity
